landing.heroSubtitle: Huza n'akazi, abacuruzi, n'abaguzi mu Rwanda hose. Kuva ku kazi k'iminsi kugeza ku bikoresho by'ubwubatsi, ibicuruzwa by'ubuhinzi kugeza kuri elegitoronike - bona byose ahantu hamwe.
landing.workersPrices: Reba ibiciro by'isoko mu gihe nyacyo
landing.businessesHire: Shaka abakozi ku kazi k'igihe gito
landing.warehousesDesc: Icyifuzo kinini? Kubara ububiko? Abafasha b'inyongera igihe ubikeneye.
landing.eventsDesc: Amakonseri, inama, ibirori. Gushaka abakozi b'igihe gito byorohewe.
landing.constructionMaterialsPricing: Ibikoresho by'ubwubatsi hamwe n'ibiciro mu gihe nyacyo
landing.businessesIntro: Hagarika kwishingikiriza ku bigo cyangwa igihe kirekire cyo gushaka abakozi. Tangaza akazi kandi utangire kubona abasaba mu minota.
landing.bulkShiftDesc: Ukeneye abantu 20, 50, cyangwa 100? Tangaza akazi kamwe kandi uzuze imyanya myinshi.
landing.transparentProfilesDesc: Reba imyirondoro y'abakozi, amanota y'akazi yashize, n'amateka y'ukwizera mbere yo kwemeza.
landing.trackHoursDesc: Igihe cyo kwinjira no gusohoka cyanditswe kugira ngo habeho ubusobanuro no gutanga raporo.
landing.payCompletedDesc: Nta masezerano y'igihe kirekire. Nta masezerano. Indishyi ishingiye ku kazi karangiye n'amasaha yakoze.
landing.reliabilityDesc: Gukurikirana kwitabira, amanota, n'amateka bifasha amasosiyete guhitamo abakozi bagaragara.
landing.workersIntro: Hindura iminsi y'ubuntu mu kazi k'igihe gito ku buryo bwawe.
landing.chooseDesc: Reba akazi kaboneka kandi usabe gusa icyo guhuza n'igenabihe ryawe.
landing.workDesc: Injira, uzuze akazi, kandi wubake amanota yawe y'ukwizera.
landing.earnDesc: Wishyurwe ukurikije amabwiriza y'akazi yemeranijwe n'ubucuruzi.
landing.growDesc: Amanota meza afungura amahirwe menshi n'akazi k'ibiciro byiza.
landing.notLongTermHiring: • Si urubuga rwo gushaka abakozi b'igihe kirekire
landing.clarificationText: Cerka ni isoko rya tekinolojiya. Ntidukoresha abakozi cyangwa gutanga serivisi zo gushaka abakozi. Amasosiyete n'abakozi bigenga bahuza mu buryo butaziguye kugira ngo batunganyirize kandi barangize akazi k'igihe gito.
landing.readyToTryDesc: Nta mafaranga yo gutangira. Nta myandikire. Tangaza akazi kandi urebe uburyo bikora.

chatbot.title: Umufasha wa Cerka
chatbot.subtitle: Ubwenge • Ubuntu • Buri gihe
chatbot.instantAnswers: Ibisubizo byihuse • Bihari buri gihe • Nta kiguzi
chatbot.greeting:
Muraho! Nshobora kugufasha gute uyu munsi?

Nshobora gusubiza ibibazo ku bijyanye n'akazi, isoko, ibiciro, n'ibindi. Ushaka kumenya iki?

helpCenter.title: Ikigo cy'Ubufasha
helpCenter.subtitle: Shakisha ibisubizo ku bibazo bikunze kubazwa kuri Cerka
helpCenter.noResults: Nta gisubizo cyabonetse ku bushakashatsi bwawe.
helpCenter.cantFind: Ntushobora kubona icyo ushaka? Itsinda ryacu ry'ubufasha riri hano kugufasha.

faq.gw1a: Jya ku rupapuro rwa "Shakisha Akazi" uhereye kuri dashboard yawe. Reba akazi kaboneka hakurikijwe ahantu, igiciro, cyangwa inganda. Kanda ku kazi icyo ari cyo kose kugira ngo ubone amakuru yuzuye, hanyuma ukande "Saba" kugira ngo wohereze ubusabe bwawe. Ubucuruzi buzasuzuma ubusabe kandi buzemeze abakozi.
faq.gw2a: Amanota yawe y'ukwizera ashingiye kuri: kugera ku gihe (40%), kurangiza akazi kose (30%), kubona amanota meza (20%), n'igihe cyo gusubiza (10%). Amanota menshi afungura akazi k'amafaranga menshi n'ibanze mu gusuzuma kuva mu bucuruzi.
faq.gw3q: Habaho iki niba nkeneye guhagarika akazi kemejwe?
faq.gw3a: Hagarika byibura amasaha 24 mbere y'uko akazi gatangira kugira ngo wirinde ibihano. Jya kuri "Gahunda Yanjye", ushake akazi, hanyuma ukande "Hagarika Akazi". Guhagarika gutinze (munsi y'amasaha 24) bizagira ingaruka mbi ku manota yawe y'ukwizera.
faq.gw4q: Nigute ninjira no gusohoka mu kazi?
faq.gw4a: Ku gihe akazi gatangira, jya kuri "Gahunda Yanjye" hanyuma ukande "Injira" ku kazi kawe gikora. Sisitemu yandika igihe watangiriye. Iyo urangije, kanda "Sohoka". Umukoresha wawe azasuzuma kandi yemeze amasaha wakoze.
faq.gw5a: Amabwiriza yo kwishyura ashyirwaho na buri bucuruzi kandi agaragara mu makuru y'akazi. Amasezerano asanzwe arimo: iherezo ry'akazi, icyumweru, cyangwa icyumweru kabiri. Kwishyura bikorwa hagati yawe n'umukoresha - Cerka ni urubuga rw'isoko, ntabwo ari umukoresha.
faq.gb1a: Kanda "Shyiraho Akazi" uhereye kuri dashboard yawe. Uzuza: umutwe w'akazi, ibisobanuro, itariki/igihe, umubare w'abakozi bakenewe, igiciro cyo kwishyurwa, n'ahantu. Suzuma hanyuma utangaze. Akazi kawe kazaboneka ku bakozi ako kanya.
faq.gb2a: Suzuma ubusabe ku rupapuro rwa "Ubusabe". Reba umwirondoro wa buri mukozi, amanota y'ukwizera, amanota yahawe mbere, n'amateka y'akazi. Kanda "Emera" kugira ngo wemeze abakozi. Bazahabwa ubutumwa kandi akazi kazagaragara muri gahunda yabo.
faq.gb3a: Yego! Ongeraho abakozi ku rutonde rwawe rwa "Abakunda" nyuma y'akazi kagenze neza. Iyo ushyiraho akazi gashya, urashobora gutumira abakozi bakunda mbere, ubaha uburenganzira bwo kubanza mbere y'uko akazi gatangazwa ku mugaragaro.
faq.gb4a: Jya kuri "Kwemeza Igihe" kugira ngo ubone inyandiko zose zo kwinjira/gusohoka. Suzuma amasaha ya buri mukozi, hindura niba bikenewe, hanyuma wemeze. Amasaha yemerejwe akoreshwa mu nyandiko zawe zo kwishyura.
faq.gb5a: Mushyire nk'"Ntagaragaye" mu bisobanuro by'akazi. Ibi bigira ingaruka ku manota ye y'ukwizera. Hanyuma urashobora kongera gushyiraho akazi vuba cyangwa kuvugana n'abakozi bo ku rutonde rwawe rw'abakunda kugira ngo uzuze icyuho.
faq.mb1q: Nigute nshakisha ibikoresho byo kubaka cyangwa ibindi bicuruzwa?
faq.mb1a: Shakisha hakurikijwe urwego (Kubaka, Ubuhinzi, Ikoranabuhanga, nibindi) uhereye kuri menu ya Marketplace. Koresha akayunguruzo k'ahantu, igiciro, n'ubwoko bw'ibikoresho. Buri cyanditswe cyerekana amakuru y'uwagurisha, ibiciro, n'uko bibonetse.
faq.mb2a: Ku cyanditswe icyo ari cyo cyose, kanda "Saba Igiciro". Sobanura umubare, ahantu hazanwa, n'igihe. Uwagurisha ahabwa ubusabe bwawe kandi ashobora gusubiza igiciro cyihariye. Kurikirana ibiciro byose muri "Amateka y'Ibiciro".
faq.mb3q: Nshobora kohereza ubutumwa abagurisha mu buryo butaziguye?
faq.mb3a: Yego! Kanda "Andikira Uwagurisha" ku cyanditswe icyo ari cyo cyose. Koresha ubutumwa bwo mu rubuga kugira ngo muganire ku bisobanuro, gutanga, amabwiriza yo kwishyura, no guhuza ibiciro. Ibiganiro byose byabitswe mu Butumwa bwawe.
faq.mb4q: Nigute nzi niba ibiciro ari byiza?
faq.mb4a: Reba "Urutonde rw'Ibiciro" kugira ngo ubone ibiciro by'isoko mu gihe nyacyo by'ibikoresho mu Rwanda. Reba ibiciro byo hagati, urwego rw'ibiciro, n'imyumvire. Gereranya ibiciro by'abagurisha n'impuzandengo z'isoko kugira ngo wemeze ko ibiciro ari byiza.
faq.mb5a: Abagurisha bemejwe barangije kwemeza umwirondoro n'isubiramo ry'inyandiko z'ubucuruzi. Shakisha ikimenyetso cy'ubururu. Imiterere yemejwe yerekana ko ari ukuri ariko ntiyemeze ubuziranenge - buri gihe reba amanota n'ibitekerezo.
faq.ms1a: Jya kuri "Urutonde Rwanjye" hanyuma ukande "Kora Urutonde". Hitamo urwego n'ubwoko bw'ibikoresho, ongeraho amafoto, shyiraho ibiciro, sobanura ahantu n'amahitamo yo gutanga. Shyiramo ibisobanuro birambuye kugira ngo ukurure abaguzi. Tangaza iyo witeguye.
faq.ms2a: Reba "Ubusabe bw'Ibiciro" uhereye kuri dashboard yawe. Suzuma ibisabwa n'uwaguze, kubara ibiciro harimo gutanga, hanyuma wohereze igiciro cyawe. Abaguzi barashobora kwemera, guhuza, cyangwa kwanga. Gusubiza vuba biteza imbere amanota yawe nk'uwagurisha.
faq.ms3q: Nigute nohereza amafoto ku rutonde rwanjye?
faq.ms3a: Iyo ukora cyangwa uhindura urutonde, kanda "Ohereza Amafoto". Urashobora kongeraho amafoto 5 kuri buri rutonde. Kurura hanyuma umanike amashusho cyangwa ukande kugira ngo ushakishe. Amafoto meza yongera inyungu z'abaguzi n'ikizere.
faq.ms4q: Nkwiye gutanga ibiciro ku Rutonde rw'Ibiciro?
faq.ms4a: Yego! Tanga ibiciro byawe nyabyo byo kugurisha kugira ngo utange umusanzu ku makuru y'ibiciro by'ubukungu mu Rwanda. Jya kuri "Tanga Igiciro" munsi y'Ibikoresho. Ibyo utanze bifasha kubaka gusobanura isoko kandi bishobora gukurura abaguzi bashakisha ibikoresho byihariye.
faq.ms5a: Jya kuri "Kwemeza" mu mwirondoro wawe. Ohereza: Indangamuntu, iyandikisha ry'ubucuruzi (niba bikeneye), n'ibimenyetso by'aho utuye. Umuyobozi asuzuma mu minsi 2-3 y'akazi. Imiterere yemejwe yongera ikizere cy'abaguzi n'ukugaragara kw'urutonde.
faq.pi1q: Ni iki Urutonde rw'Ibiciro by'Ubukungu mu Rwanda?
faq.pi1a: Ububiko bw'ibiciro by'ibikoresho mu Rwanda mu gihe nyacyo, buturuka ku bagurisha n'abaguzi. Reba ibiciro byo hagati, urwego rw'ibiciro, ihinduka, n'imyumvire y'ibikoresho byo kubaka, ubuhinzi, n'ibindi.
faq.pi2a: Jya ku Bikoresho > Imyumvire y'Ibiciro. Reba amashusho y'umwuga yerekana imyuka y'ibiciro y'iminsi 30, imyumvire y'umubare, n'ihinduka. Hitamo ibikoresho byihariye kugira ngo usesengure. Ohereza amakuru kuri CSV kugira ngo usesengure wenyine.
faq.pi3a: Imenyesha ikora ku buryo bwikora ku bijyanye n'impinduka z'ingenzi z'isoko: ibiciro byiyongera, kubura ibikoresho, abagurisha bashya, cyangwa ihinduka ridasanzwe. Reba "Ibimenyetso by'Isoko" kugira ngo ubone imenyesha iriho kandi ufate ibyemezo byuzuye byo kugura cyangwa kugurisha.
faq.pi4a: Ibiciro bituruka ku rutonde nyarwo rw'abagurisha n'ibyo abakoresha batanze. Ibimenyetso by'ubuziranenge bw'amakuru byerekana: umubare w'inkomoko, ubushya bw'amakuru, n'urwego rw'ikizere. Abagurisha benshi = ibiciro byuzuye. Reba ikimenyetso cy'"Ubuziranenge bw'Amakuru" kuri buri bikoresho.
faq.pi5a: Yego! Ku rupapuro rw'Imyumvire y'Ibiciro, kanda "Ohereza CSV" kugira ngo ukurure amakuru y'ibiciro y'ibikoresho byose. Harimo: izina ry'ibikoresho, igiciro cyo hagati, urwego rw'ibiciro, ihinduka, umubare w'abagurisha, n'itariki yahinduwe bwa nyuma.
faq.ap1a: Kanda "Iyandikishe" hanyuma uhitemo uruhare rwawe: Umukozi (shakisha akazi), Ubucuruzi (shyiraho akazi), Uwagurisha (gura ibikoresho), cyangwa Uwaguze (gura ibikoresho). Uzuza amakuru yawe, emeza imeri yawe, hanyuma uzuze umwirondoro wawe.
faq.ap2a: Jya ku rupapuro rw'Umwirondoro wawe hanyuma ukande ku cyiciro cy'avatar. Shyiraho ifoto isobanutse yawe (ku bakozi) cyangwa ikirango cy'ubucuruzi bwawe (ku bucuruzi/abagurisha). Amafoto yubaka ikizere n'ubwiza.
faq.ap3q: Nshobora kugira inshingano nyinshi kuri konti imwe?
faq.ap3a: Ubu ntabwo. Buri konti ifite uruhare rumwe nyamukuru. Niba ukeneye inshingano nyinshi (urugero, umukozi n'uwagurisha), kora konti zitandukanye hamwe n'aderesi z'imeri zitandukanye.
faq.ap4a: Jya ku Mwirondoro > Igenamiterere. Kanda "Hindura Ijambo ry'Ibanga", andika ijambo ryawe ry'ibanga ry'ubu n'ijambo rishya ry'ibanga. Ku mutekano, koresha ijambo ry'ibanga rikomeye rifite inyuguti, imibare, n'ibimenyetso.
faq.ap5q: Ni ayahe makuru agaragara ku bandi?
faq.ap5a: Abakozi: izina, ifoto, amanota y'ukwizera, amanota, n'amateka y'akazi. Ubucuruzi: izina ry'isosiyete, ikirango, n'amanota. Abagurisha: izina ry'ubucuruzi, ahantu, imiterere yemejwe, n'amanota. Amakuru yo kuvugana ni ibanga kugeza igihe uhisemo gusangira.
faq.pf1a: Cerka ubu ikoreshwa ku buntu n'abakoresha bose. Dushobora gutangiza ibintu byiza byihitiyemo mu gihe kizaza, ariko imikorere y'ibanze (gushyiraho akazi, gukora urutonde, gushakisha) izaguma ari ubuntu.
faq.pf2a: Cerka ni urubuga rw'isoko - duhuza abaguzi n'abagurisha, abakozi n'ubucuruzi. Kwishyura byose bitunganywa mu buryo butaziguye hagati y'impande. Ntidukora kwishyura cyangwa gufata amafaranga.
faq.pf3q: Ni ayahe mabwiriza yo kwishyura nshobora kwemera nk'ubucuruzi/uwagurisha?
faq.pf3a: Wowe uhitamo! Uburyo busanzwe mu Rwanda: Amafaranga ya Telefoni (MTN, Airtel), kohereza kuri banki, cyangwa amafaranga. Sobanura uburyo bwo kwishyura wemera mu bisobanuro by'akazi cyangwa ibisobanuro by'urutonde.
faq.st1q: Nigute ntanga raporo y'ibikorwa bikekwaho cyangwa uburiganya?
faq.st1a: Kanda "Tanga Raporo" ku cyanditswe icyo ari cyo cyose, umwirondoro, cyangwa akazi. Sobanura ikibazo kandi utange ibimenyetso niba bihari. Itsinda ryacu ryo kugenzura risuzuma raporo zose mu masaha 24 kandi rifata ingamba zikwiye.
faq.st2q: Nkwiye gukora iki niba umuntu ambwira kwishyura hanze y'urubuga?
faq.st2a: Wibwirize. Nubwo Cerka idakora kwishyura, ibikorwa byemewe bigomba kuganirwaho mu buryo bwuzuye. Ntuzigere wohereza amafaranga ku bakoresha batemejwe, cyane cyane ku "amadepozito" cyangwa "amafaranga yo kwiyandikisha". Tanga raporo y'ubusabe bukekwaho.
faq.st3a: Abakoresha barashobora kwemeza umwirondoro wabo bohereza Indangamuntu n'inyandiko z'ubucuruzi. Abayobozi basuzuma kandi bemeza. Abakoresha bemejwe babona ikimenyetso cy'ubururu. Buri gihe hitamo gukorana n'abakoresha bemejwe kugira ngo ubone umutekano wiyongereye.
faq.st4q: Nshobora kubona amanota n'ibitekerezo mbere yo gukorana n'umuntu?
faq.st4a: Yego! Kanda ku mwirondoro w'umukoresha uwariwo wese kugira ngo ubone amanota yabo, ibitekerezo biva mu bikorwa byashize, n'amanota y'ukwizera (ku bakozi). Koresha aya makuru kugira ngo ufate ibyemezo byuzuye.
faq.ts1a: Gerageza izi ntambwe: 1) Ongera upapuro (Ctrl+R cyangwa Cmd+R), 2) Hanagura cache ya mushakisha wawe, 3) Gerageza mushakisha utandukanye (Chrome, Firefox, Safari), 4) Reba umuyoboro wawe wa interineti. Niba ibibazo bikomeje, vugana n'ubufasha.
faq.ts2q: Nshobora gukoresha Cerka kuri telefoni yanjye igendanwa?
faq.ts2a: Yego! Cerka irakoreshwa neza kuri telefoni. Fungura mushakisha wawe wa telefoni hanyuma ujye ku rubuga rwa Cerka. Ibintu byose bikora kuri telefoni, nubwo imirimo imwe igoye (nko gukora urutonde rurambuye) ishobora kuba yoroshye kuri mudasobwa.
faq.ts3q: Nwibagiwe ijambo ryanjye ry'ibanga. Nigute ndyasubiza?
faq.ts3a: Ku rupapuro rwo kwinjira, kanda "Wibagiwe Ijambo ry'Ibanga". Andika aderesi yawe ya imeri. Uzahabwa umuyoboro wo gusubiza ijambo ry'ibanga. Kanda umuyoboro hanyuma ukore ijambo rishya ry'ibanga. Umuyoboro urangira nyuma y'isaha 1.
faq.ts4a: Kanda "Ubufasha" muri menu, hanyuma "Vugana n'Ubufasha". Uzuza ifishi hamwe n'ikibazo cyawe. Shyiramo amashusho niba bifasha. Itsinda ryacu risubiza mu masaha 24 ku minsi y'akazi.

trends.name: Izina

chatbotKnowledge.fallback1:
Sinashoboye kubona igisubizo cyihariye kuri ibyo. Dore icyo nshobora kugufasha:

• Gushakisha no gusaba akazi
• Gutangaza akazi no gucunga abakozi
• Kureba isoko
• Gusobanukirwa Urutonde rw'Ibiciro
• Konti n'kwemezwa

Gerageza gusobanura ikibazo cyawe cyangwa uvugane n'ubufasha kugira ngo uhabwe ubufasha bwihariye.
chatbotKnowledge.fallback2:
Hmm, sindi nzi neza kuri ibyo. Ndi mwiza mu gusubiza ibibazo ku bijyanye na:

• Akazi k'agateganyo (akazi, ubusabe, kwishyura)
• Isoko (ibikoresho, abagurisha, ibiciro)
• Urutonde rw'Ibiciro (amakuru y'isoko, imyumvire)
• Gucunga konti

Ushaka kumenya iki kuri ibi?
chatbotKnowledge.fallback3:
Nta makuru mfite kuri icyo kibazo cyihariye. Ndi umuhanga mu:

• Ibikoresho by'abakozi n'abakoresha
• Isoko n'abagurisha
• Ubwenge bw'ibiciro
• Gukoresha urubuga

Nshobora kugufasha ku kimwe muri ibi?
chatbotKnowledge.welcomeWorker: gushakisha akazi no gukurikirana akazi kawe
chatbotKnowledge.welcomeMessageBody: ! Ndi umufasha wawe wa Cerka, ndi hano kugufasha
chatbotKnowledge.welcomeMessageTopics:
Nshobora gusubiza ibibazo ku bijyanye na:

• Gushakisha no gusaba akazi
• Gutangaza akazi no gukoresha abakozi
• Kureba isoko
• Gusobanukirwa Urutonde rw'Ibiciro
• Konti n'kwemezwa
• Umutekano n'ubufasha

Ushaka kumenya iki?
chatbotKnowledge.lowConfidenceNote: Icyitonderwa: Sindi nzi neza niba ibi bisubiza ikibazo cyawe? Gerageza gusobanura cyangwa uvugane n'ubufasha.
